entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop studied for its response to soil salinity

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: High salt concentration in the soil affecting plant growth

entities.name: NORMAL SOIL
entities.description: Soil without excessive salt levels used as a control

entities.name: SEED PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The percentage of protein found in the seeds of the crop

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: The weight or dimensions of the seeds, measured as 100-seed weight

entities.name: GERMINABILITY
entities.description: The ability of the seeds to germinate under specific conditions

relationships.description: Reduces the average seed protein content in chickpea
Possesses seed protein content as a measurable trait
Possesses seed size as a measurable trait
Possesses germinability as a measurable trait
